evals.description: Golden path: create synchronized implementation plan and progress tracker from repo baseline plus target spec.
evals.prompt: Create an implementation plan and synchronized progress tracker for this project using `README.md` as the current baseline and `spec.md` as the target scope. Track this as work item W-000101.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should write W-000101-IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md and W-000101-progress.txt (both sharing the W-000101 prefix). The plan should identify gap mode, cite current baseline, define milestones with acceptance criteria, synchronize progress items with plan phases, and note that both files move to docs/archive/ on completion.

assertions.prompt: The response should confirm that W-000101-IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md and W-000101-progress.txt are synchronized (or explicitly identify any unresolved mismatch), and both files should share the W-000101 prefix.

evals.description: Update path: preserve completed progress items while adding missing plan coverage.
evals.prompt: Update the implementation plan and progress tracker for work item W-000101. Preserve any completed progress items exactly as completed.

evals.description: Adjacent negative: GitHub user-story backlog requests belong to arc-creating-user-stories, not this root-artifact plan skill.
evals.prompt: Turn this PRD into GitHub Issues with Gherkin user stories and labels. Do not create IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md or progress.txt.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should not force root-level implementation plan/progress artifacts when the user specifically asked for GitHub Issues.

assertions.prompt: The response should avoid insisting on IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md or progress.txt and should recognize that the request is for GitHub issue/story creation rather than synchronized root-level planning artifacts.
